creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #2)

Thanks for the log.

There are following lines at L26367-26368 in the log.

=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for electron33-33.3.0

I suspect you are building the port with poudriere and it has reached the max execution time during the build.

If so, please increase the value of MAX_EXECUTION_TIME in poudriere.conf.
